isBookmarked.description: In case this API call is invoked with a user context this allows changing of the bookmark flag.

isPublic.description: Sets the issue to public or private.

isSubscribed.description: In case this API call is invoked with a user context this allows the user to subscribe to workflow notications for this issue.

organization_id_or_slug.description: The ID or slug of the organization the issue belongs to.

update_an_organization.description: Update various attributes and configurable settings for the given organization.

alertsMemberWrite.description: Specify `true` to allow members to create, edit, and delete alert rules by granting them the `alerts:write` scope.

allowJoinRequests.description: Specify `true` to allow users to request to join your organization.

allowSharedIssues.description: Specify `true` to allow sharing of limited details on issues to anonymous users.

attachmentsRole.description:
The role required to download event attachments, such as native crash reports or log files.

* `member` - Member
* `admin` - Admin
* `manager` - Manager
* `owner` - Owner

avatar.description: The image to upload as the organization avatar, in base64. Required if `avatarType` is `upload`.

avatarType.description:
The type of display picture for the organization.

* `letter_avatar` - Use initials
* `upload` - Upload an image

cancelDeletion.description: Specify `true` to restore an organization that is pending deletion.

codecovAccess.description: Specify `true` to enable Code Coverage Insights. This feature is only available for organizations on the Team plan and above. Learn more about Codecov [here](/product/codecov/).

dataScrubber.description: Specify `true` to require server-side data scrubbing for all projects.

dataScrubberDefaults.description: Specify `true` to apply the default scrubbers to prevent things like passwords and credit cards from being stored for all projects.

debugFilesRole.description:
The role required to download debug information files, ProGuard mappings and source maps.

* `member` - Member
* `admin` - Admin
* `manager` - Manager
* `owner` - Owner

defaultRole.description:
The default role new members will receive.

* `member` - Member
* `admin` - Admin
* `manager` - Manager
* `owner` - Owner

enhancedPrivacy.description: Specify `true` to enable enhanced privacy controls to limit personally identifiable information (PII) as well as source code in things like notifications.

eventsMemberAdmin.description: Specify `true` to allow members to delete events (including the delete & discard action) by granting them the `event:admin` scope.

githubNudgeInvite.description: Specify `true` to allow Sentry to detect users committing to your GitHub repositories that are not part of your Sentry organization. Requires a GitHub integration.

githubPRBot.description: Specify `true` to allow Sentry to comment on recent pull requests suspected of causing issues. Requires a GitHub integration.

gitlabPRBot.description: Specify `true` to allow Sentry to comment on recent pull requests suspected of causing issues. Requires a GitLab integration.

hasGranularReplayPermissions.description: Specify `true` to enable granular replay permissions, allowing per-member access control for replay data.

hideAiFeatures.description: Specify `true` to hide AI features from the organization.

isEarlyAdopter.description: Specify `true` to opt-in to new features before they're released to the public.

issueAlertsThreadFlag.description: Specify `true` to allow the Sentry Slack integration to post replies in threads for an Issue Alert notification. Requires a Slack integration.

metricAlertsThreadFlag.description: Specify `true` to allow the Sentry Slack integration to post replies in threads for a Metric Alert notification. Requires a Slack integration.

name.description: The new name for the organization.

openMembership.description: Specify `true` to allow organization members to freely join any team.

organization_id_or_slug.description: The ID or slug of the organization the resource belongs to.

replayAccessMembers.description: A list of user IDs who have permission to access replay data. Requires the hasGranularReplayPermissions flag to be true to be enforced.

require2FA.description: Specify `true` to require and enforce two-factor authentication for all members.

safeFields.description: A list of global field names which data scrubbers should ignore.

scrapeJavaScript.description: Specify `true` to allow Sentry to scrape missing JavaScript source context when possible.

scrubIPAddresses.description: Specify `true` to prevent IP addresses from being stored for new events on all projects.

sensitiveFields.description: A list of additional global field names to match against when scrubbing data for all projects.

slug.description: The new slug for the organization, which needs to be unique.

storeCrashReports.description:

* `1` - 1 per issue
* `5` - 5 per issue
